## Deduplication Log

No exact duplicates found across domains. Some issues overlap in scope:
- MILE-06 (Experiment Runner) and IMPL-07 (__main__.py CLI) and IMPL-12 (ExperimentFactory) — IMPL issues are implementation details of MILE-06
- MILE-01 (Config Schema) and IMPL-10 (schemas.py) — IMPL is implementation detail of MILE-01
- MILE-02 (StateView & Environment) and IMPL-08 (state.py) and IMPL-09 (environment.py) — IMPL issues are implementation details of MILE-02
- DOC-02 (Missing interfaces) and IMPL-08/09/10/11 — DOC issue tracks documentation, IMPL issues track implementation

**Resolution:** Milestone issues (MILE-*) are the parent issues. Implementation issues (IMPL-*) are child tasks. Doc issues (DOC-*) track documentation debt separately from implementation.
